'''Ginger''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was recruited into the [[Army of Light/Legends|Army of Light]] during the [[New Sith Wars]] to [[Jedi training/Legends|train]] in the ways of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and help defend the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], Ginger was born on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] and recruited into the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order's]] [[Army of Light/Legends|Army of Light]] as members of the army moved across the Outer Rim. Testing positive as a Force-sensitive, Ginger was taken with the Jedi and their vassals as they followed [[Jedi Lord]] [[Hoth (Jedi Lord)|Hoth's]] charge towards the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]]. Serving in the army's kitchen, Ginger befriended fellow [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiate]] to the Order [[Hardin|Bug]] while the Army was resting during the [[Ruusan campaign]]. It was Ginger who informed Bug that their friend, [[Darovit|Tomcat]], had killed [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Kiel Charny]]. During the [[Seventh Battle of Ruusan]], Ginger was struck down by the Jedi traitor Tomcat, now known by his true name, Darovit.<ref name="JVS" />
